scripts.copy-keys: mkdir -p ./public/midnight/nightpool/keys ./public/midnight/nightpool/zkir ./public/midnight/vault/keys ./public/midnight/vault/zkir && cp -r ../contract/src/managed/nightpool/keys/* ./public/midnight/nightpool/keys/ && cp -r ../contract/src/managed/nightpool/zkir/* ./public/midnight/nightpool/zkir/ && cp -r ../contract/src/managed/vault/keys/* ./public/midnight/vault/keys/ && cp -r ../contract/src/managed/vault/zkir/* ./public/midnight/vault/zkir/ && mkdir -p ./public/midnight/oracle/keys ./public/midnight/oracle/zkir && cp -r ../contract/src/managed/oracle/keys/* ./public/midnight/oracle/keys/ && cp -r ../contract/src/managed/oracle/zkir/* ./public/midnight/oracle/zkir/
